post.subject: Unswerving Bullet Channel Details
post.content:
Dear Proxy, the Exclusive Channel Unswerving Bullet is coming soon. Signal Search Reception Rate will be boosted for Zhu Yuan (Attack - Ether)!


[Event Duration]

2024/7/24 12:00:00 (server time) – 2024/8/13 14:59:59 (server time)


[Signal Search Details]

• During this event, Reception Rates for the limited S-Rank Agent Zhu Yuan (Attack - Ether) and A-Rank Agents Nicole (Support - Ether) & Ben (Defense - Fire) are significantly boosted!

※ The limited S-Rank Agent above will not become available in the Star-Studded Cast Stable Channel.

※ This Channel is an Exclusive Channel. The Search count for guaranteed Signals is cumulative across all Exclusive Channels but is independent of and unaffected by other types of Channels.

※ For more information on Signal Searches, please press Details at the bottom-left of the Search page.


[The Final Callback - Audition Stage]

• Requirements: Reach Inter-Knot Lv. 8, and unlock the Event feature in the Main Story Prologue - Intermission.

• Event Duration: 2024/7/24 12:00:00 (server time) – 2024/8/13 14:59:59 (server time)

• Event Contents: Proxies can try out Agents Zhu Yuan (Attack - Ether), Nicole (Support - Ether), and Ben (Defense - Fire) in audition stages. Upon clearing the stage for the first time, Proxies can claim rewards on the results screen.
